examples: Still, the consumer backlash resonates, and not simply because CFLs are horrible, flickery, ugly, and unreliable.
Just like Windows XP, Lindows initially sets the screen to a flickery, eye-busting 60Hz refresh rate.
Told over three acts, the story begins in 1959 and is told though flickery old-school animation.
At any rate, both systems are said to be at least as good as, and probably better than, film, which looks jittery and flickery in comparison.
